title: Add the Podman Logo
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adding the Podman Logo

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 1e4a69a has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 1e4a69ae4fe74c01547764f016a668620fb7ee62 -->
Will touchup the links, just pushed the svg over to keep things from getting merged.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/libpod/a1ac074126290e36b7a9ff9f1875203409b3abbe.1526394417388603392/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing a1ac074126290e36b7a9ff9f1875203409b3abbe to master...

Uh-oh. Mergebot merged anyways.
@TomSweeneyRedHat I think you'll need to open a fresh PR to fix.
Yes, well at least we finally have a logo, now just need to fix its location.
Never mind, need to get this fixed ASAP.
